title: Define Acceptance Criteria Clearly
guidance: Product framing should make done visible to engineering QA and docs
do: Write concrete acceptance criteria and out-of-scope boundaries
dont: Do not leave success criteria implicit or purely subjective

title: Protect Scope Boundaries
guidance: Clarify what is not included so implementation does not expand by accident
do: Name non-goals and frozen boundaries early
dont: Do not allow ambiguous scope to turn into silent feature creep

title: State Priority When Tradeoffs Exist
guidance: When scope cannot fit all requests the product view should make priority visible
do: Rank must-have should-have and optional behavior
dont: Do not present all asks as equally mandatory
